name: ContextFuse-2048-BigramSmear
author: Julz19
blurb: Builds on PR #143 ContextFuse-2048 with BigramHash, SmearGate, mixed int6 export, SWA, Muon weight decay, corrected bigram control-tensor handling, and a fixed sliding-window evaluator. The canonical metric is the corrected seed-1337 reevaluation recorded in train_fixed_eval_seed1337.log; the extra seed logs are retained for transparency only and are not used as a post-fix statistical claim.
